title: Apple supplier checks suggest steady iPhone demand into spring
summary: Channel checks from suppliers indicated stable iPhone demand trends, easing concerns about a sharp seasonal slowdown.

title: Apple reportedly expands AI features in next software preview
summary: Reports suggest Apple is preparing additional on-device AI features in upcoming software updates for iPhone and Mac.

title: Apple shares rise as analysts highlight AI services opportunity
summary: Several Wall Street analysts raised their price targets on Apple, citing upside from integrating on-device AI across the iPhone and Mac ecosystem.

title: Report: Apple faces regulatory pressure in Europe over App Store fees
summary: EU regulators advanced a case focused on mobile app distribution practices, raising headline risk for Apple in the region.

title: Apple buyback discussion supports downside cushion view
summary: Strategists noted Apple's capital return profile could provide support during broad market volatility episodes.

title: Developers watch Apple App Store policy updates after EU feedback
summary: Developers and analysts monitored possible policy changes that could affect service economics in Europe.

title: Microsoft enterprise bookings improve as AI copilots scale
summary: Large enterprise contracts reflected stronger copilot adoption, reinforcing software demand resilience.

title: Microsoft adds new security controls for AI assistants
summary: The company announced additional governance controls for AI tools, aiming to accelerate regulated-industry adoption.

title: Microsoft Cloud growth accelerates on AI demand
summary: Azure revenue growth re-accelerated as enterprise customers expand spending on AI infrastructure and copilots.

title: Microsoft warns of higher capex as AI build-out continues
summary: Management guided to elevated capital expenditures to support AI data center investments, which may pressure near-term free cash flow.

title: Analysts lift Microsoft estimates on cloud margin stability
summary: Research notes pointed to improving cloud efficiency and durable software renewal demand.

title: Microsoft cloud contracts remain robust despite macro caution
summary: Partners reported stable cloud pipeline activity even as some corporate budgets remained tight.

title: Nvidia partners highlight continued AI accelerator demand
summary: Ecosystem partners cited sustained demand for AI accelerators, though lead times remained extended.

title: Nvidia supply chain update points to gradual bottleneck relief
summary: Industry checks suggested some supply constraints may ease in selected product lines over coming quarters.

title: Nvidia extends rally after another strong data center quarter
summary: Nvidia beat expectations on data center GPU demand, but management acknowledged supply constraints into the second half of the year.

title: Analysts debate sustainability of Nvidia margins
summary: Some analysts questioned whether current gross margins are sustainable as competition intensifies and AI pricing normalizes.

title: Chip export policy discussion resurfaces for advanced AI hardware
summary: Policy headlines around advanced chip exports reintroduced uncertainty around regional demand assumptions.

title: Nvidia software ecosystem expansion seen as competitive moat
summary: Analysts argued software tooling and developer lock-in may support long-term platform durability.

title: Tesla delivery preview points to mixed regional trends
summary: Preliminary checks suggested stronger U.S. demand but softer momentum in parts of Europe.

title: Tesla supplier commentary highlights battery cost improvements
summary: Component cost trends may support gradual margin stabilization if pricing pressure moderates.

title: Tesla cuts prices again in key markets
summary: Tesla announced another round of price cuts in Europe and China, reigniting concerns about EV demand and margin pressure.

title: Tesla pushes full self-driving update to wider fleet
summary: The company expanded access to its latest full self-driving beta, calling it a major step toward autonomous capability, though regulators remain cautious.

title: Tesla margin outlook debated as EV competition intensifies
summary: Analysts split on whether pricing actions are temporary or indicate a longer normalization in EV profitability.

title: Tesla autonomy roadmap update keeps long-term optionality in focus
summary: Investors weighed near-term execution risk against potential long-term software monetization from autonomy.
